basic_details.job_title: Bijapur District Rural Horticulture Extension Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Bijapur District has officially announced the Rural Horticulture Extension Officer Recruitment 2026 with 8 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advertisement No. 180 / स्थापना-डीएमएफ / ग्रा.उ.वि.अ.भर्ती / 2026-27 / बीजापुर. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 35 years and hold an Agriculture/Horticulture Graduate Degree can now submit their offline applications up to 15-06-2026. Direct links to download the notification and application form are shared below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation will be provided as per rules for reserved categories.

selection_process: Academic Merit (80%) Experience (max 5 marks) Interview (15 marks)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Bijapur District Rural Horticulture Extension Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: bijapur.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Bijapur District Rural Horticulture Extension Officer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Bijapur District Rural Horticulture Extension Officer posts is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate Degree in Agriculture or Horticulture to be eligible for the Rural Horticulture Extension Officer posts.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Rural Horticulture Extension Officer position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies for the Rural Horticulture Extension Officer post in Bijapur District.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 18 years and 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Rural Horticulture Extension Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 26,490.00.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the specified address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Bijapur District Rural Horticulture Extension Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on academic merit (80%), experience (maximum 5 marks), and an interview (15 marks).

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Which district is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by Bijapur District in the state of Chhattisgarh.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity for the Rural Horticulture Extension Officer posts.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Bijapur District Rural Horticulture Extension Officer posts?
